utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each one includes the required details: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance with associated costs (€275/month bundled), property_coverage specifies home/contents insurance with costs (€275/month bundled), travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with costs (€80/month) and details, additional_services specifies enhancement services with costs (€20/month), and total_budget provides a complete monthly cost breakdown (€375/month). All are fully specified with coverage details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan bundles health and property insurance together (€275/month) and includes both physical and mental health benefits plus property protection for luxury items and electronics. This aligns best with the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health (each rated 9) and the 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' for property (rated 9). The plan also includes wellness programs, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, family therapy, psychiatry, specialist care, and condition management — these map to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3), 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 4), 'Family Therapy Coverage' (rating 2), and 'Specialist Access' (rating 3). The travel coverage (€80/month) includes adventure travel and global coverage, matching 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) and 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10). The additional services (€20/month) include concierge, priority claims, and global assistance, which aligns with 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 6). Therefore, the coverage items and their ratings are mapped accordingly.
